title: Senior Software Engineer - ABB India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ABB India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
jsonLd.skills: Machine Learning, JavaScript, Python, React, Git, Node.js, SQL, AWS
